goal: Research Note minigame foundation with server state, aspect slots, note screen and solve packet
implemented: ResearchNoteGrid with 19 hex-like slots and neighbor calculation.
ResearchNoteState stores target research, progress, solved flag and placed aspect slots in item NBT.
ResearchNoteSolver validates known aspects, consumes aspect pool and checks connected aspect path.
ClientResearchNoteData stores synced note state for the client screen.
ResearchNoteScreen renders the note puzzle, aspect palette and solve button.
ResearchNoteSyncPacket syncs note state server to client.
OpenResearchNotePacket opens the client note screen.
RequestPlaceResearchNoteAspectPacket sends slot/aspect placement to server.
RequestSolveResearchNotePacket checks solve server-side and unlocks target research if solved.
ResearchNoteItem shift-right-click opens the puzzle instead of always trying to unlock.
not_a_costyl: Research note state is stored on the ItemStack NBT, not faked on the client.
Aspect placement is validated by the server.
Aspect pool is consumed on the server for non-creative players.
Solving checks a connected path through placed aspects.
remaining_before_full_tc4: Exact TC4 hex graph/layout and aspect distance rules.
Research note generation based on exact selected research components.
Scribing ink cost per action and better animation.
More faithful TC4 connection rendering lines and glyphs.
